content.full_text:
California
Fair Political
Practices Commission

June 15, 1988

John D. Flitner
City Attorney
City of Rohnert Park
6750 Commerce Boulevard
Rohnert Park, CA 94927

Re: Our File No. I-88-217

Dear Mr. Flitner:

We have received your letter requesting formal written
advice on behalf of yourself and Rohnert Park Rent Board
Members Ralph Jones and Ron Militello.

In our letter of May 10, 1988, we provided informal
assistance pursuant to Regulation 18329(c) because your letter
stated only a general question and did not advise us of
specific decisions pending before the Rohnert Park Rent Board.
Your letter also contained insufficient facts about Mr. Jones'
and Mr. Militello's economic interests for us to provide
specific advice. Your new request for formal written advice
provides no additional information about particular decisions
pending before the board or the economic interests of Mr. Jones
and Mr. Militello.

Conflict of interest advice depends on the particular facts
of the governmental decision and the economic interests of the
public officials in question. Thus, conflict of interest
advice must be determined on a case-by-case basis, after all
material facts are provided. Because your letters do not
contain all the material facts about specific pending decisions
of the Rohnert Park Rent Board and the board members' economic
interests, we cannot provide formal written advice at this

428 J Street, Suite 800 • P.O. Box 807 • Sacramento CA 95804-0807 • (916)322-5660

John D. Flitner
June 15, 1988
Page -2-


time. The informal assistance we previously provided is the
only response we can make unless we have additional information
from you.

In the future, if you wish to request formal written advice
concerning a specific pending decision of the Rohnert Park Rent
Board, we would need the following information:

     (1) A description of the pending decision.

     (2) A statement concerning whether Mr. Jones or Mr.
Militello has any clients who are "appearing before" the board
in connection with the decision, within the meaning of
Regulation 18702.1.

     (3) A statement concerning whether Mr. Jones or Mr.
Militello has any clients whose expenses are likely to be
affected by $250 or more in a year, or whose mobile homes are
likely to be affected by $1,000 or more, as a result of the
decisions.

     (4) Facts which indicate whether a significant segment of
the population of Rohnert Park are likely to be affected by the
pending decision in substantially the same manner as Mr. Jones'
or Mr. Militello's clients.

     (5) A statement concerning whether the gross revenues of
either Mr. Jones' or Mr. Militello's businesses are likely to
increase or decrease by $10,000 or more in a year as a result
of the pending decision.

If you wish to obtain advice concerning a specific pending
board decision, we would be pleased to provide formal written
advice upon submission of these material facts. If you have
any questions concerning this letter, please contact me at
(916) 322-5901.

                                        Sincerely,

                                        Diane M. Griffiths
                                        General Counsel
                                        [signature]
                                        By: Kathryn E. Donovan
                                        Counsel, Legal Division

CITY OF ROHNERT PARK

6750 Commerce Boulevard
Rohnert Park, Sonoma County, California 94027
Telephone 793-2411

JUN 9 8 [illegible] 88


June 7, 1988


Ms. Kathy E·Donovan, Counsel
Legal Division, Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
P. O. Box 807
Sacramento, California

Re: Your File No. I-88-116

Dear Ms. Donovan:

Thank you for your informal opinion dated May 10, 1988,
regarding the above matter. The Rohnert Park Rent Board noted
footnote 2 on page 1 of your letter wherein it is stated that
informal assistance does not provide the requestor with the
immunity provided by an opinion or formal written advice.

The members of the Rent Review Board are appointed to serve
without compensation and would appreciate it very much, as would
I, if the Commission would issue an opinion or provide formal
written advice so that the parties involved, so long as they
conduct themselves within the constraints of the opinion or
advice, can rely on it and the accompanying immunity.

Would you therefore please consider this letter as a request for
an opinion or formal written advice.

Thank you for your consideration in this matter.

Very truly yours,

JOHN D. FLITNER
CITY ATTORNEY

sections.conclusion: Because your letters do not contain all the material facts about specific pending decisions of the Rohnert Park Rent Board and the board members' economic interests, we cannot provide formal written advice at this time. The informal assistance we previously provided is the only response we can make unless we have additional information from you.
sections.question_synthetic: Whether Rohnert Park Rent Board members Ralph Jones and Ron Militello have conflicts of interest with respect to pending decisions before the board, given their potential economic interests.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: FPPC declines to provide formal written advice because the request lacks specific information about pending board decisions and the economic interests of the board members. The FPPC outlines the specific factual information needed to provide formal advice in the future.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Document is FPPC's declination letter responding to a request for formal written advice. No verbatim QUESTION section header exists in the document; question_synthetic derived from letter content. Conclusion text extracted from main body. Document includes prior informal opinion dated May 10, 1988, and lists five specific informational requirements for future requests.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: Whether Rohnert Park Rent Board members Ralph Jones and Ron Militello have conflicts of interest with respect to pending decisions before the board, given their potential economic interests.

CONCLUSION: Because your letters do not contain all the material facts about specific pending decisions of the Rohnert Park Rent Board and the board members' economic interests, we cannot provide formal written advice at this time. The informal assistance we previously provided is the only response we can make unless we have additional information from you.

embedding.summary: FPPC declines to issue formal written advice on conflict of interest questions for Rohnert Park Rent Board members, stating that the request contains insufficient facts about specific pending decisions and the members' economic interests. FPPC provides a detailed list of information required for future formal advice requests.
